message:
feat(store,command,runtime): track total_error_replies, reads_processed, writes_processed in INFO stats

Add three new stat fields to Store:
- stat_total_error_replies: incremented in Runtime::execute_frame whenever
  the response is a RESP Error frame, giving an accurate live counter.
- stat_total_reads_processed and stat_total_writes_processed: scaffolded
  fields exposed via INFO stats (populated by callers in a follow-up).

Wire all three into the INFO stats section output and into the RESETSTAT
reset path. Expand unit tests in fr-command and fr-runtime to verify the
counter increments, survives non-error commands unchanged, and is zeroed
by RESETSTAT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
